name: magendoo/module-product-labels
description: Product labels for Magento 2 - first-class label entities with stable codes, manual assignment via product attribute, rule-computed assignments materialized by an indexer, PLP/PDP badges and GraphQL exposure

suggest.magento/module-graph-ql: Exposes product labels in the GraphQL products query
suggest.magento/module-catalog-graphql: Required for the magendoo_labels GraphQL field (the schema extends its ProductInterface)
